chiefComplaint: Post-operative TKR (Total Knee Replacement) pain, right knee. Difficulty with flexion and extension.
assessment: Patient reports pain level at 7/10. Observable swelling around the knee joint. Limited range of motion: Flexion at 90 degrees, Extension lacking 5 degrees. Gait is antalgic.
treatmentProvided: Manual therapy including gentle patellar mobilization. Cryotherapy to reduce swelling. Prescribed and demonstrated basic quad-setting and heel-sliding exercises.
planOfCare: Continue physiotherapy 3 times a week for 4 weeks. Focus on improving range of motion and strength. Re-assess progress in 2 weeks. Patient to perform home exercise program daily.
